svg.text: Smart Rural AI Advisor - Complete AWS Architecture
Serverless AI-Powered Agricultural Advisory System for Indian Farmers
HTTPS | API Key in Secrets Manager
English, Hindi, Tamil, Telugu, Kannada, Malayalam, Bengali, Marathi,
• Weather Lookup (Current + 5-day forecast with farming advisory)
• Crop Doctor (Image-based disease diagnosis with Nova Pro Vision)
• Farmer Profile (Persistent farm details for personalization)
• Bedrock Guardrails (Content filtering, PII detection, topic gating)
